distance_from_start.description: Cumulative distance along the route from frame 0, in metres.

building_ratio.description: Combined building pixel area as fraction of total frame area [0, 1]. Shows urban density.
building_ratio.note: Decreases monotonically from 0.51 (Taksim) to 0.001 (Taşkışla), encoding commercial-to-cultural transition.

sky_ratio.description: Sky pixel area as fraction of total frame area [0, 1]. Indicates vertical openness.

vegetation_ratio.description: Vegetation pixel area (trees, grass, plants) as fraction of total frame area [0, 1].
vegetation_ratio.note: Rises from 0.001 (Taksim commercial) to 0.998 (Taşkışla green), the inverse of building_ratio.

building_left.description: Building pixel area in left half of frame, as fraction of full frame. Used for L-pan audio. Range [0, 1].
building_left.note: Zero from frame 13 onward (west side of street opens to Gezi Park).

building_right.description: Building pixel area in right half of frame, as fraction of full frame. Used for R-pan audio. Range [0, 1].
building_right.note: Persists longer than building_left; right side remains built-up to frame 20.

person_count.description: Number of persons detected in frame via object detection. Normalized to 10 for audio amplitude.
person_count.note: No zero values; minimum is 3 (frame 23, quiet Taşkışla gallery zone). High throughout (mean 10.42), reflecting pedestrian-dominant route.

vehicle_count.description: Number of vehicles (cars, buses, motorcycles) detected. Normalized to 8 for audio amplitude.
vehicle_count.note: Concentrated in Taksim (frames 0–4, max 10). Drops to 0 from frame 17 onward (pedestrianized zone).
